name: FIT@HCMUS Report
description: Long-form academic report package tailored for FIT @ VNUHCM University of Science students, with a custom TikZ front page, report-style preamble, and bibliography wiring.
author: tranlynhathao
notes: First real template in the reports category; the report-family scaffold remains the structural reference.
The front-page image in asset/frontpage.png is used as the catalog thumbnail and was produced by the template author.
pdf_demo/Report.pdf is an author-provided compiled snapshot; the platform separately verifies main.tex compiles via pdflatex.
Most report body sections are commented out in main.tex by default so the package compiles as a blank shell ready to be filled in.
